title: Avengers: Endgame
overview: After the devastating events of Avengers: Infinity War, the universe is in ruins due to the efforts of the Mad Titan, Thanos. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers must assemble once more in order to undo Thanos' actions and restore order to the universe once and for all, no matter what consequences may be in store.

title: Dovzhenko. First Sight
overview: Ukrainian Odesa, 1926: a city recovering from the war, a city where jazz sounds and cinema is born. Young artist Sashko Dovzhenko seeks freedom in art - and stumbles upon a system that does not forgive dreams. His first film may be his last. And he does not yet know that soon his name will be known to the whole world.

title: The Potion
overview: A horror film based on the legendary work of Olga Kobylianska "On Sunday Early I Dug a Potion".

title: Mayday
overview: When a U.S. Navy pilot on a top-secret mission during the Cold War gets trapped behind enemy lines, his only chance at survival is to form an alliance with an eccentric ex-KGB agent.

title: Practical Magic 2
overview: A multi generational family of witches, cursed to be loveless for centuries, attempts to break the spell by confronting dark secrets and sacrificing for each other.

title: The Runner
overview: A high-powered attorney must race through London, following the cryptic commands of a mysterious caller, as she fights against time to save her abducted son.

title: Voice of the Heart
overview: Zheka is a war veteran from a small southern town who fixes cable TV and occasionally raps at local weddings. Returning to civilian life, he is completely alone and sees no prospects for his own future, until he learns that he has an 8-year-old daughter he never knew about.

title: La Fille dans les nuages
overview: The adventures of a young girl named Providence, who is entrusted with a magic quill that makes everything she writes come true. Faced with this incredible power, she has to choose between living her dreams and saving the world.

title: Kin
overview: After many years of actively avoiding her family, Mariia finally decides to pay them a visit, seemingly to celebrate her grandmother's jubilee. However, her intentions might not be as wholesome as it seems, as the true nature of her visit lies in the fact that the birthday girl decided to grant Mariia the ownership over her home. Mariia's uncle Grygorii learns of this and decides to engage in a turf war with his niece, hoping that this will result in the latter changing her mind. However, the young entrepeneur is a tougher nut to crack than it initially looks.

title: Shaun the Sheep: The Beast of Mossy Bottom
overview: The residents of Mossy Bottom Farm looking forward to Halloween – until the clumsy Farmer trashes the flock’s beloved pumpkin patch! When Shaun turns mad scientist to fix the problem, things rapidly spiral out of control. With the Farmer missing and a wild beast roaming the woods of Mossingham, all the ingredients are in place for a monstrously fun family adventure.

title: Le Fantôme de l'Opéra
overview: Anastasia, an 18-year-old ballet dancer at the Opéra Garnier, becomes the obsession of a disfigured man living in the opera's underground labyrinth.

title: Heaven's Office Games
overview: Four carefree bachelors get into a car accident after a night of partying and find themselves in purgatory — a world of endless bureaucracy and chaotic digital reforms. At the Heaven’s Office, they receive their sentence: a direct express train to hell. Using their charm, they convince the purgatory secretary to give them a chance — seven days on Earth to atone for their sins. But once back, they realize they’ve fallen into a trap hidden in the perfectly ironic fine print of heaven.
